---
title: "Track A (multi-ROI): Multi-estimand change engine (Δ / %Δ / log / |Δ|)"
format: html
execute:
  echo: true
  warning: false
  message: false
---

## Purpose
Compute multiple change estimands for outcome **Y** and ROI values across ROIs/features, then run a grid of change–change models:

Estimands:
- raw signed change: ΔX = X2 − X1
- percent change: %ΔX = 100 × (X2 − X1) / X1
- log ratio: log(X2 / X1)
- absolute magnitude: |ΔX| = |X2 − X1|

For each ROI and estimand:
- coupling model: ΔY ~ ΔROI + Age0 + Group
- moderation model: ΔY ~ ΔROI * Group + Age0

```{r}
library(dplyr)
library(readr)
library(here)

source(here::here("R", "estimand_engine_multiROI.R"))

in_dir  <- here::here("outputs", "trackA_multiROI")
out_dir <- in_dir

dat_long_core <- readRDS(file.path(in_dir, "dat_long_core_qc_ageTimeline.rds"))
dat_roi_long  <- readRDS(file.path(in_dir, "dat_roi_long_qc_ageTimeline.rds"))

# Build wide paired change table per ROI_name (one row per ID per ROI)
wide_roi <- make_wide_change_table_multiROI(
  dat_roi_long = dat_roi_long,
  id = "ID",
  roi_name = "ROI_name",
  time = "time_point",
  roi_value = "ROI_value",
  outcome_long = dat_long_core %>% select(ID, time_point, Y, Sex, Age0),
  outcome = "Y",
  group = "Sex",
  age0 = "Age0"
)

# Add estimands for Y and ROI_value
wide_est <- add_estimands_multiROI(
  wide_roi = wide_roi,
  y_prefix = "Y",
  x_prefix = "ROI"
)

# Run grid of models (like v3x)
res <- run_estimand_grid_models(
  wide_est = wide_est,
  group = "Sex",
  age0 = "Age0"
)

write_csv(wide_est, file.path(out_dir, "trackA_wide_estimands_byROI.csv"))
write_csv(res,      file.path(out_dir, "trackA_estimand_engine_results.csv"))

res
```
